name: Noel Gifts International Ltd
summary: Noel Gifts International Ltd provides hampers, flowers, and gifts in Singapore and Malaysia. The company operates in two segments, Gifts and Properties. It operates a franchise program that provides franchisees the right to use the company's name. The company also engages in creative gift designs; and markets, sells, operates, and purchases strategies and systems. In addition, it invests in and develops properties. Noel Gifts International Ltd offers its products through its retail outlets and online. The company was formerly known as Noel Hampers and Gifts Pte Ltd and changed its name to Noel Gifts International Ltd in 1993. Noel Gifts International Ltd was founded in 1975 and is based in Singapore.
